lessons.title: Web App Architecture & HTTP Review 🌐
lessons.description: Understand how web applications work and refresh HTTP essentials for hacking.

lessons.title: OWASP Top 10: The Hit List 📋
lessons.description: Meet the most critical web application security risks.

lessons.title: SQL Injection (SQLi) 💉
lessons.description: Learn to extract, modify, and delete databases through vulnerable inputs.

lessons.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) 🎭
lessons.description: Inject malicious scripts into web pages to steal sessions and deface sites.

lessons.title: Broken Authentication & Session Hijacking 🔑
lessons.description: Exploit weak login mechanisms, session fixation, and cookie theft.

lessons.title: File Inclusion & Directory Traversal 📂
lessons.description: Read arbitrary files and execute remote code via path traversal.

lessons.title: Command Injection & File Uploads 💣
lessons.description: Execute system commands and upload malicious files to compromise servers.

lessons.title: Web Enumeration & Burp Suite Basics 🛠️
lessons.description: Master the essential tools for mapping and intercepting web traffic.
